sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic ethnicity) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen in {3, 4} (non-citizen or first papers only) | year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre/post DACA; 2012 excluded) | yrimmig > 0 (has a valid immigration year) | birthyr in [1971, 1996] (control: 1971-1981 too old for DACA; treated: 1982-1996 age-eligible) | yrimmig <= birthyr + 15 (arrived in US before age 16)
model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_x_post + daca_eligible + post + age + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (not a US citizen, proxy for undocumented status) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre/post periods, 2012 excluded as transition year) | birthyr in [1977, 1978, 1979, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1984, 1985] (4 cohorts below and above DACA age cutoff; 1981 dropped due to mixed eligibility) | gq in [1, 2] (households only, excludes group quarters) | age >= 18 (adults only) | empstat in [1, 2, 3] (valid employment status, excludes N/A) | yrimmig >= 1 and yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived in US by 2007, proxy for continuous presence since June 15, 2007) | yrimmig - birthyr < 16 (arrived before age 16, approximation for DACA arrival criterion)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('fulltime_emp ~ treated * post + birthyr_c + C(year) + C(statefip) + sex', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic of Mexican origin) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (non-citizen; proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, satisfying 5-year US residence requirement) | yrimmig - birthyr < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre/post window; 2012 dropped as DACA transition year) | birthyr >= 1972 and birthyr <= 1996 (covers control cohort 1972-1981 and treated cohort 1982-1996) | age >= 18 and age <= 40 (working-age adults)
model_specification_line: res = smf.wls(formula='fulltime ~ post_x_elig + eligible + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age**2) + C(sex)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: HISPAN == 1 (Mexican-origin Hispanic) | BPL == 200 (born in Mexico) | CITIZEN in [3, 4] (non-citizen) | YRIMMIG > 0 AND YRIMMIG <= 2007 (immigrated to US by 2007) | YRIMMIG - BIRTHYR < 16 (arrived before age 16) | BIRTHYR between 1977 and 1996 (DiD age comparison window) | GQ in [1, 2] (non-institutional household) | YEAR in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA years, excluding 2012) | AGE between 18 and 40 (working age)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ treated_post + treated + post + age + age2 + C(sex) + C(state) + C(yr)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['state']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic ethnicity) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 or citizen == 4 (not a US citizen) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, satisfying 5-year continuous presence criterion) | (yrimmig - birthyr) >= 0 and (yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday) | birthyr >= 1977 and birthyr <= 1991 (ensures all are at least 18 during study period; treated: 1982-1991, control: 1977-1981) | year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre-period 2009-2011 and post-period 2013-2016, excluding 2012 transition year)
model_specification_line: smf.ols('ft_employed ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + female', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic origin) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (not a US citizen) | age >= 18 and age <= 45 (working-age adults) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre-DACA: 2009-2011, post-DACA: 2013-2016; 2012 excluded as transition year) | arrival_age = yrimmig - birthyr, restricted to 0 <= arrival_age < 16 (arrived in US before age 16, matching DACA criterion) | birthyr in 1982-1986 (treated) or 1977-1981 (control), symmetric 5-year bandwidth around the age-31 DACA eligibility cutoff
model_specification_line: result = smf.ols('full_time ~ treated * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age**2) + C(sex)', data=df).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip'].astype(int)})

sample_selection: bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | hispan == 1 (Hispanic of Mexican ethnicity) | citizen == 3 (not a citizen — proxy for undocumented status) | year in [2006,2007,2008,2009,2010,2011,2013,2014,2015,2016] (pre-DACA: 2006-2011; post-DACA: 2013-2016; 2012 excluded) | birthyr in [1976, 1996] (control: 1976-1981; treatment: 1982-1996) | yrimmig > 0 (immigration year recorded) | yrimmig >= birthyr (arrived after birth) | (yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday — DACA requirement) | yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived before continuous-residence threshold of June 15 2007) | age >= 16 (working-age population)
model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ eligible_post + eligible + post + age_f + age_sq + male + UNEMP + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
control_variables: eligible | post | age_f | age_sq | male | UNEMP

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic ethnicity) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (not a citizen; proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig > 0 (has a recorded immigration year) | (yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived in the US before age 16; key DACA criterion) | gq in [1, 2, 5] (household resident; not institutionalized) | age >= 16 (working age) | birthyr in [1974, 1996] (treated group 1982-1996 + control group 1974-1981) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA; 2012 excluded as transition year)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + dida + age + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['weight']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen in [3, 4] (non-citizen, proxy for undocumented status) | year in [2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA; 2012 excluded as transition year) | birthyr >= 1975 and birthyr <= 1996 (relevant birth cohorts for DiD) | age >= 18 (working-age adults) | yrimmig > 0 (year of immigration known) | yrimmig < birthyr + 16 (arrived in US before 16th birthday, DACA requirement)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + treat_post + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + sex + educ', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic origin) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (non-citizen, proxy for undocumented/non-LPR status) | gq in [1, 2, 5] (non-institutional household) | yrimmig > 0 (known year of immigration) | age_at_immig >= 0 and < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday, DACA requirement) | yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived by 2007, proxy for >= 5 years continuous US residence before DACA) | age_in_2012 in [15, 40] (cohorts spanning the DACA age-31 cutoff: treatment age 15-30, control age 31-40) | age >= 18 at survey time (working age) | year in [2006, 2011] or [2013, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA periods, excluding transition year 2012)
treatment_definition: df['age_in_2012'] <= 30 (age <= 30 as of June 15, 2012, i.e., born after June 15 1981 -- DACA-eligible by the age-31 cutoff)
model_specification_line: model = smf.wls('full_time_emp ~ daca_eligible * post_daca + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age**2)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic ethnicity) | citizen == 3 (non-citizen, proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, at least 5 years in US by June 2012) | (yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived before age 16, DACA requirement) | age >= 18 and age <= 40 at survey year | sex in (1, 2) (non-missing sex) | empstat in (1, 2, 3) (non-missing employment status) | not (empstat == 1 and uhrswork == 0) (drop employed with missing hours) | year in (2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016) (pre-DACA 2009-2011, post-DACA 2013-2016; exclude 2012 transition year) | birthyr >= 1982 (treat=1: under 31 on June 15, 2012) OR birthyr in [1972, 1981] (treat=0: 31-40 on June 15, 2012)
model_specification_line: model = smf.ols(formula='full_time ~ treat * post + age + age_sq + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex)', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic origin) | bpl == 200 (Born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (Not a citizen; proxy for undocumented status) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre and post periods; 2012 excluded as transition year) | age between 15 and 40 | yrimmig >= 1900 and yrimmig <= 2007 (valid immigration year; arrived by 2007 per DACA continuous-presence criterion) | yrimmig - birthyr_use < 16 (arrived before age 16, per DACA criterion) | birthyr_use in [1972, 1997] (age 15-40 as of June 2012, covering treatment and control cohorts)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('empstat_ft ~ treat * post + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: Hispanic origin = Mexican (HISPAN == 1) | Born in Mexico (BPL == 200) | Non-citizen (CITIZEN in {3, 4}) | Survey years 2009-2011 and 2013-2016 (year 2012 excluded as DACA transition year) | Non-institutional group quarters (GQ != 3) | Valid immigration year (yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig != 996) | Age 18-45 in survey year | Arrived in US before age 16 (yrimmig - birthyr <= 15) | Immigrated by 2007 (yrimmig <= 2007, satisfying 5-year continuous presence requirement) | birthyr != 1981 (excluded: ambiguous relative to June 15 DACA age cutoff)
model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ treat * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(age) + sex + educ + state_unemp', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: Hispanic of Mexican origin: hispan == 1 | Born in Mexico: bpl == 200 | Not a US citizen (proxy for undocumented): citizen == 3 | Survey years 2009-2011 (pre-DACA) and 2013-2016 (post-DACA); excludes 2012 | Immigrated to the US between 1970 and 2007 (yrimmig >= 1970 and yrimmig <= 2007) | Age at arrival 0-21 years (treatment: arrived before 16; control: arrived at 16-21) | Born 1982 or later (birthyr >= 1982; under 31 as of June 15, 2012) | Working age at survey time: 18-35 years old
treatment_definition: (df['age_at_arrival'] <= 15).astype('int8')  # age_at_arrival = yrimmig - birthyr; sample restricted to birthyr >= 1982 (under 31 on June 15, 2012)
model_specification_line: smf.ols('full_time ~ daca_eligible * post + C(statefip) + C(year) + age', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic-Mexican origin) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (non-citizen, approximating undocumented/unlawful status) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated to US by 2007) | (yrimmig - birthyr) < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday) | birthyr >= 1976 and birthyr <= 1996 (treatment cohort 1982-1996 + control cohort 1976-1981) | empstat in [1, 2, 3] (in civilian labor force or NILF; excludes N/A) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre-DACA and post-DACA years; 2012 excluded as transition year)
model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ did + daca_eligible + birthyr_c + C(sex) + C(educ) + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt_adj']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic-Mexican ethnicity) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (non-citizen, proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig - birthyr <= 15 (arrived before 16th birthday, DACA criterion) | yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived by 2007, proxy for continuous US residence since June 15, 2007) | birthyr in [1975, 1994] (control group 1975-1981; treatment group 1982-1994) | year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre/post periods, 2012 excluded as DACA transition year)
model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('fulltime ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['weight']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic origin: Mexican) | bpld == 20000 (born in Mexico, detailed birthplace code) | citizen in [3, 4] (not a US citizen) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, continuous US residence since then) | yrimmig <= (year - age) + 15 (arrived before 16th birthday) | birth_year (year - age) in [1977, 1986] (bandwidth around DACA age cutoff) | age between 18 and 40 (working-age adults) | survey year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre/post periods; 2012 excluded as transition year)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + age_sq', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican Hispanic origin) | bpl == 200 (Born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (Not a citizen; proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007; proxy for 5-yr continuous US presence) | arrived_as_child: yrimmig <= birthyr + 15 (arrived before 16th birthday) | birthyr in 1972-1996 (defines treatment and control birth cohorts) | age >= 18 and age <= 45 in survey year (working-age adults) | year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (excludes 2012 transition year) | treatment group: birthyr >= 1982 and arrived_as_child == 1 | control group: birthyr in 1972-1981 and arrived_as_child == 1
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + daca_eligible:post + age + I(age**2) + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic origin: Mexican) | bpl == 200 (Born in Mexico) | citizen in [3, 4] (Not a US citizen — proxy for undocumented status) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (Arrived in US by 2007 — proxy for continuous presence since June 15, 2007) | yrimmig - birthyr < 16 (Arrived before 16th birthday — DACA eligibility condition) | birthyr >= 1977 (Control group lower bound: age 31-35 as of June 15, 2012) | birthyr <= 1996 (Treatment group upper bound: at least age 17 in 2013) | year != 2012 (Exclude DACA rollout year; pre-period: 2006-2011, post-period: 2013-2016)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment * post + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: ethnically Hispanic-Mexican: hispan == 1 | born in Mexico: bpl == 200 | non-citizen (proxy for lacking lawful status): citizen == 3 | survey years 2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016 (2012 excluded as DACA transition year) | birth year 1972-1997: defines treated cohort (birthyr >= 1982, age < 31 at June 2012) and control cohort (birthyr 1972-1981, age 31-40 at June 2012) | immigrated to the US (yrimmig > 0) by 2007 or earlier (yrimmig <= 2007, proxy for continuous residence since June 15 2007) | arrived before age 16: (yrimmig - birthyr) >= 0 and < 16 (key DACA arrival-age criterion) | at least 18 years old at survey time: age >= 18
treatment_definition: (birthyr >= 1982).astype(float)  # age < 31 as of June 15 2012 — DACA-eligible age cohort
model_specification_line: smf.ols('employed_ft_dm ~ post_dm + treated_dm + post_treated_dm', data=df).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})

sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican-Hispanic) | bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) | citizen == 3 (not a citizen, undocumented proxy) | yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, continuous US residence criterion) | yrimmig <= birthyr + 15 (arrived before 16th birthday) | birthyr between 1975 and 1996 (cohort window: control born 1975-1981, treated born 1982-1996) | age >= 16 (working age) | year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre-DACA and post-DACA periods; 2012 excluded as transition year) | perwt > 0 (valid survey weight)
model_specification_line: model = smf.wls('full_time ~ treated + post + treated:post + C(sex) + educ + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')

sample_selection: BPL == 200 (born in Mexico) | HISPAN == 1 (Hispanic-Mexican ethnicity) | CITIZEN in [3, 4] (non-citizen; proxy for undocumented status) | GQ in [1, 2] (household, not group quarters) | YEAR in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (2012 excluded as DACA transition year) | YRIMMIG > 0 (valid year of immigration) | YRIMMIG <= BIRTHYR + 15 (arrived before 16th birthday) | YRIMMIG <= 2007 (in US continuously since at least 2007) | BIRTHYR in [1972, 1997] (control: 1972-1981 just-too-old; treated: 1982-1997 DACA-eligible)
model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + daca_x_post + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
